Cell.Data: PLAYER_INTERACTION

The DEV TEAM / MISC NOTES column contains info on what text between { } signs means (if applicable). It usually stands for either a numeric value, or a numeric value with an icon. Text between [ ] signs stands for a certain type of icon.
SCENE ID
TEXT ID
ENGLISH STRING
LOCALIZED STRING
ALTERNATIVE ENGLISH STRING
ALTERNATIVE LOCALIZED STRING
LOCALIZATION NOTES
DEV TEAM / MISC NOTES
HEADER
GREET_FIRSTMEET_NEGATIVE_01
{STR_leaderName}, I don't believe we have met. I suspect you are here for the same reasons as I am, so make sure you don't get in my way. Types like you caused the downfall of the Star Union.

{STR_leaderName}, chyba się jeszcze nie spotkaliśmy. Podejrzewam, że przybywasz tu w tym samym celu, co ja, postaraj się więc nie wchodzić mi w drogę. To właśnie tacy jak ty doprowadzili Związek Gwiezdny do upadku.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
HEADER
GREET_FIRSTMEET_NEUTRAL_01
Well met, {STR_leaderName}. We hope that we can maintain positive relations and co-exist on this planet, that our people can re-emerge from these ruins together.
Miło cię poznać, {STR_leaderName}. Mam nadzieję, że będziemy utrzymywać przyjazne stosunki i współistnieć na tej planecie, dzięki czemu nasze populacje będą mogły wznieść sobie nowe domy na ruinach.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
HEADER
GREET_FIRSTMEET_POSITIVE_01

Greetings, {STR_leaderName}. It is good to meet a new face. We recently arrived on this planet as well. We hope to foster a peaceful relationship so that we may make this planet prosperous once again.

Witaj, {STR_leaderName}. Dobrze jest ujrzeć nową twarz. My też dopiero co przybyliśmy na tę planetę. Mamy nadzieję na pokojowe relacje między nami, dzięki którym na powrót zmienimy ten świat w kwitnące miejsce.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
HEADER
GREET_NEGATIVE_01
State your business, {STR_leaderName}.
Jaką masz sprawę, {STR_leaderName}?

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
HEADER
GREET_NEGATIVE_02
You dare bother me, {STR_leaderName}?
Śmiesz zawracać mi głowę, {STR_leaderName}?

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
HEADER
GREET_NEGATIVE_03
What is it now {STR_leaderName}? Have you come to make amends?
O co znów chodzi {STR_leaderName}? Przybywasz zadośćuczynić za wyrządzone szkody?

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
HEADER
GREET_NEUTRAL_01
Hello, {STR_leaderName}. What brings you to this planet?
Cześć, {STR_leaderName}. Co sprowadza cię na tę planetę?

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
HEADER
GREET_NEUTRAL_02
Greetings to you, {STR_leaderName}.
Pozdrowienia, {STR_leaderName}.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
HEADER
GREET_NEUTRAL_03
What is it this time, {STR_leaderName}?
O co znów chodzi, {STR_leaderName}?

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
HEADER
GREET_POSITIVE_01
Salutations, honorable {STR_leaderName}. Do you require assistance?
Pozdrowienia, szlachetny {STR_leaderName}. Czy potrzebujesz pomocy?

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
rewritten, please check
HEADER
GREET_POSITIVE_02
Greetings {STR_leaderName}, valued friend.
Witaj, {STR_leaderName}, drogi przyjacielu.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
HEADER
GREET_POSITIVE_03
Is there anything we can help with, {STR_leaderName}?
Czy możemy wam w czymś pomóc, {STR_leaderName}?

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
rewritten, please check
HEADER
GREET_TRADE_RESULT_POSITIVE_01
Hello, {STR_leaderName}. We are very pleased to have received your trade offer.
Cześć, {STR_leaderName}. Otrzymanie waszej oferty handlowej sprawiło nam wielką przyjemność.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
HEADER
GREET_TRADE_RESULT_NEUTRAL_01
Greetings, {STR_leaderName}. We have received your trade offer.
Witaj, {STR_leaderName}. Otrzymaliśmy waszą ofertę handlową.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
HEADER
GREET_TRADE_RESULT_NEGATIVE_01
I received your paltry trade offer, {STR_leaderName}.
Otrzymaliśmy waszą nędzną ofertę handlową, {STR_leaderName}.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
HEADER
GREET_TRADE_PROPOSE_POSITIVE_01
My friend, {STR_leaderName}! I have a trade offer for you.
{STR_leaderName}, przyjacielu! Mam dla ciebie ofertę handlową.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
HEADER
GREET_TRADE_PROPOSE_NEUTRAL_01
Hello again, {STR_leaderName}. I have a proposal for you.
Witaj ponownie, {STR_leaderName}. Mam dla ciebie propozycję.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
HEADER
GREET_TRADE_PROPOSE_NEGATIVE_01
{STR_leaderName}, I have a trade offer for you to evaluate.
{STR_leaderName}, mam ofertę handlową, nad którą moglibyście się zastanowić.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
HEADER
GREET_TRADE_COMPLETED_01
{STR_leaderName}, thank you for accepting the trade.
{STR_leaderName}, dziękujemy za przyjęcie naszej oferty handlowej.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
HEADER
GREET_WARNING
{STR_leaderName}... I am very well aware of what you have done.
{STR_leaderName}... dobrze wiem, co tam zrobiliście.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
HEADER
GREET_WARNING_EXT
Greetings, {STR_leaderName}. I have some information on {STR_warnedPlayerName} that may be valuable to you.
Witaj, {STR_leaderName}. Mam pewne informacje, które mogą się wam przydać. Na temat frakcji {STR_warnedPlayerName}.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
HEADER
GREET_CALLTOWAR
Good tidings to you, {STR_leaderName}! I come to you in my time of need with a request.
Wszystkiego dobrego, {STR_leaderName}! Przychodzę do ciebie w trudnym czasie z pewną prośbą.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
HEADER
GREET_HOSTILEACTION
You'll need to rethink this relation of ours, {STR_leaderName}.
Musisz przemyśleć stosunki między nami, {STR_leaderName}.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
HEADER
GREET_FRIENDLYACTION
Hello, {STR_leaderName}. I'm glad to hear from you again.
Cześć, {STR_leaderName}. Miło cię znowu widzieć.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
HEADER
GREET_SURRENDER
{STR_leaderName}, have mercy on our wretched souls! There has been enough bloodshed. You have proved yourself superior.
{STR_leaderName}, zlituj się nad naszymi umęczonymi duszami! Dość już rozlewu krwi. Dowiedliście, że jesteście potężniejsi.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
rewritten, please check
HEADER
GREET_DEMANDSURRENDER
{STR_leaderName}, stop fooling yourself. There is no possible chance of you claiming victory in this war.
{STR_leaderName}, przestań się oszukiwać. Nie macie żadnych szans na wygranie tej wojny.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
HEADER
GREET_RESPONSE_WARNED_POSITIVE_01
{STR_leaderName}, I am shocked by your warning! It was never my intention to upset our relationship.
{STR_leaderName}, twoje ostrzeżenie nami wstrząsnęło! Nigdy nie mieliśmy zamiaru psuć stosunków między nami.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
HEADER
GREET_RESPONSE_WARNED_NEUTRAL_01
{STR_leaderName}, I hear your warning and shall take note of it.
{STR_leaderName}, otrzymaliśmy i odnotowaliśmy twoje ostrzeżenie.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
HEADER
GREET_RESPONSE_WARNED_NEGATIVE_01
{STR_leaderName}, do you think your warning means something to me?
{STR_leaderName}, wydaje ci się, że twoja ostrzeżenia coś dla nas znaczą?

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
HEADER
GREET_RESPONSE_FALSELYWARNED_POSITIVE_01
{STR_leaderName}, this must be a mistake. I never had any part in the actions you speak of.
{STR_leaderName}, to musi być jakaś pomyłka. Nigdy nie braliśmy udziału w wydarzeniach, o których mówisz.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
HEADER
GREET_RESPONSE_FALSELYWARNED_NEUTRAL_01
{STR_leaderName}, why do you you accuse me of such things? You are either poorly informed or lying.
{STR_leaderName}, dlaczego oskarżasz mnie o takie rzeczy? Albo łżesz, albo masz niedokładne informacje.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
HEADER
GREET_RESPONSE_FALSELYWARNED_NEGATIVE_01
{STR_leaderName}, how dare you spread your false propaganda about me?
{STR_leaderName}, jak śmiesz rozsiewać swą kłamliwą propagandę na nasz temat?

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
OPINION
POSITIVE_01
May our people leave the Dark Age behind us and prosper together.
Oby nasi mieszkańcy pozostawili za sobą mroczne wieki i rozwijali się wspólnie.
OPINION
NEUTRAL_01
We feel our relationship may be at a turning point.
Mamy wrażenie, że nasze stosunki mogą stać się punktem zwrotnym w dziejach.
OPINION
NEGATIVE_01
We will be watching your movements closely. Any threat to our colonies will be eliminated.
Będziemy się bacznie przyglądać waszym poczynaniom. Jakiekolwiek zagrożenia dla naszych kolonii będą eliminowane.
TRADE
ACCEPT_KINDLY_POSITIVE
I happily accept your trade offer.
Z radością akceptuję twoją ofertę handlową.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
TRADE
ACCEPT_KINDLY_NEUTRAL
We appreciate your offer and will gladly accept.
Doceniamy waszą propozycję i przyjmujemy ją z przyjemnością.
TRADE
ACCEPT_KINDLY_NEGATIVE
I suppose this offer will benefit me. I accept.
Sądzę, że ta oferta będzie dla nas korzystna. Zgadzam się.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
TRADE
ACCEPT_CONSIDERATELY
In my opinion, I'm accepting this trade offer as a favor to you.
Moim zdanie oddaję wam przysługę, przyjmując waszą ofertę handlową.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
TRADE
ACCEPT_DOUBTFUL
After very careful consideration, I will accept your trade offer.
Po dokładnych rozważaniach przyjmuję waszą ofertę handlową.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
TRADE
ACCEPT_AGAINSTBETTERJUDGEMENT
Against my better judgement, I will accept your trade offer.
Wbrew swoim przekonaniom przyjmę twoją ofertę handlową.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
TRADE
ACCEPT_GIFT
I will not refuse a gift, especially something I can use. Thank you.
Darów się nie odrzuca, zwłaszcza użytecznych. Dziękuję ci.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
TRADE
ACCEPT_HIGH_DEMAND
I will gladly do you this favor. Consider your demands accepted.
Z radością oddam wam tę przysługę. Wasze życzenie zostało przyjęte.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
rewritten
TRADE
ACCEPT_NORMAL_DEMAND
These demands seem reasonable. I will comply.
Te życzenia wydają się rozsądne. Zgadzamy się.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
rewritten
TRADE
ACCEPT_LOW_DEMAND
While purely in your favor, I will accept your demands.
Co prawda przyniesie to korzyść wyłącznie wam, ale zgadzamy się na wasze żądania.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
TRADE
ACCEPT_VERYLOW_DEMAND
You drive a hard bargain with your demands, but I shall comply, just this once.
Wysuwasz twarde żądania, ale spełnimy je. Tylko tym razem.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
rewritten
TRADE
ACCEPT_HIGH_TREATY
The proposed deal is fine. I'll gladly accept this treaty.
Proponowane porozumienie jest słuszne. Z radością akceptuję ten traktat.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
rewritten
TRADE
ACCEPT_NORMAL_TREATY
The proposal seems fair enough. I will accept the treaty.
Ta propozycja wydaje się dość sprawiedliwa. Zaakceptuję ten traktat.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
rewritten
TRADE
ACCEPT_LOW_TREATY
I have my doubts about this treaty, but I will accept the deal.
Mam pewne wątpliwości co do tego traktatu, ale przyjmuję waszą propozycję.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
TRADE
ACCEPT_VERYLOW_TREATY
I will accept the proposed treaty, but there had better not be any abuse of my trust.
Zgodzę się na zaproponowany traktat, ale lepiej nie nadużywajcie mojego zaufania.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
rewritten
TRADE
DECLINE_GENERIC
Now is not the right time. Come back later.
To nie jest dobry moment. Wróćcie przy innej okazji.
TRADE
DECLINE_OPINION
Our relationship is trouble, and I cannot accept your trade offer at this time.
Nasze stosunki sprawiają mi kłopot i nie mogę w tej chwili przyjąć waszej oferty handlowej.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
TRADE
DECLINE_CASUSBELLI
I will not accept your trade offer until you provide full reconciliation for your previous actions against me.
Nie przyjmę waszej oferty handlowej, dopóki nie zapewnicie nam pełnej rekompensaty za swoje wcześniejsze wrogie działania.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
rewritten
TRADE
DECLINE_REPUTATION
It is not in my interest to accept this petty trade offer.
Przyjmowanie tej nędznej oferty handlowej nie leży w naszym interesie.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
TRADE
DECLINE_CONNECTIONS
You associate with the wrong types. Your offer shall not be accepted.
Zadajecie się z niewłaściwymi osobami. Wasze propozycja zostanie odrzucona.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
rewritten
TRADE
DECLINE_COST
I cannot currently agree with your offer. This is too precious for me to give up.
Aktualnie nie możemy przyjąć waszej propozycji. To, czego chcecie, jest dla nas zbyt cenne.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
rewritten
TRADE
DECLINE_IMBALANCE
This trade is too far in your favor. Suggest a better deal. Then we'll talk.
Ta umowa przyniosłaby wam o wiele więcej korzyści niż nam. Zaproponujcie coś lepszego, wtedy pogadamy.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
TRADE
DECLINE_INSUFFICIENTFUNDS
I simply do not have the resources available to meet this request.
Po prostu nie mamy środków, których wymaga ta umowa.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
TRADE
DECLINE_COOLDOWN
We already traded recently. Your offer had better be a good one. Otherwise you can try again another time.
Handlowaliśmy całkiem niedawno. Lepiej, żeby twoja propozycja była atrakcyjna. W przeciwnym razie możesz spróbować przy innej okazji.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
TRADE
DECLINE_JUSTMET
We've only just met - I'm not ready to change the course of our relationship just yet. Perhaps later.
Dopiero co się poznaliśmy – po prostu jeszcze nie jesteśmy gotowi na zmianę kursu w kontaktach z wami. Może później.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
rewritten
TRADE
DECLINE_DIPLOMATICCOOLDOWN
We changed our relationship too recently. We can talk again at a later time.
Zmienialiśmy nasze stosunki całkiem niedawno. Możemy o tym porozmawiać później.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
rewritten
TRADE
DECLINE_PLANINCOMPATIBLE
Unfortunately, I must decline your proposal as it does not align with my plans.
Niestety muszę odrzucić twoją propozycję, gdyż nie współgra ona z moimi planami.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
TRADE
DECLINE_CANTACCEPTVASSALAGE
Ha! Under these conditions, only cowards would accept vassalage!
Ha! Tylko tchórze zgodziliby się na wasalizację na takich warunkach!

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
rewritten
TRADE
DECLINE_WONTBREAKUPCOLONY
I cannot accept your trade offer, as it would leave some of my sectors disconnected from my colonies.
Nie możemy przyjąć waszej propozycji, gdyż spowodowałaby oddzielenie części sektorów od naszych kolonii.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
TRADE
DECLINE_TREATYCOOLDOWN
I do not accept, as we only recently changed a diplomatic treaty. We can come back to this at a later time.
Nie zgadzam się, gdyż całkiem niedawno zmieniliśmy traktaty dyplomatyczne. Możemy do tego wrócić przy innej okazji.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
rewritten
TRADE
PROPOSE_CONTACTINFO

I've recently come into contact with a commander of the {STR_raceName}. Perhaps I could introduce you to them? My reconnaissance comes at a price, however. Are you willing to strike a deal for this information?
Niedawno nawiązaliśmy kontakt z dowódcą innej frakcji ({STR_raceName}). Być może moglibyśmy was im przedstawić? Ale nasza pomoc będzie mieć swoją cenę. Czy dobijemy targu?

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
ACTION
INSULT_01
You are pathetic, dirty rats that have crawled up out of the rubble!
Jesteście żałosnymi, plugawymi szczurami, które wypełzły ze śmietnika!

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
ACTION
INSULT_02
You are an abomination, an obstacle in this planet's return to greatness.
Jesteście czystą ohydą, przeszkodą w przywracaniu wielkości tej planecie.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
ACTION
INSULT_03
The fall of the Star Union was caused by incompetents like you.

To musi być jakiś plan. Pogorszenie stan relacji dyplomatycznych między nami nie jest mile widziane.
Rewritten, please check
RESPONSE
DEGRADERELATION_NEGATIVE_01
These actions were long foreseen, and only reinforce our distrust of you. If our relations do not improve, war will be inevitable.
Te działania były przewidywane od dawna i tylko wzmocniły naszą nieufność wobec ciebie. Jeśli nasze stosunki się nie poprawią, wojna będzie nieunikniona.

DECLINE_DUPLICATERESOURCE

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
TRADE
PROPOSE_COUNTER
What about this offer instead? It seems like a more even trade for the both of us.
A może dokonamy takiej wymiany? Wydaje się bardziej uczciwa dla obu stron.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
ACTION
PROPOSE_SECTORTRADE_01
I propose that you trade this sector with me. I have done the calculations, and this should prove mutually beneficial.
Proponujemy wam wymianę sektorów. Przeprowadziliśmy odpowiednie obliczenia i wymiana powinna przynieść korzyści obu stronom.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
TRADE
DECLINE_COLONYTOOVALUABLE
Hmm, I can't accept your trade offer. Trading colonies on this scale would be detrimental to my empire.
Hmm, nie mogę przyjąć twojej propozycji. Wymiana kolonii na tę skalę przyniosłaby szkody mojemu imperium.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
ACTION
FORESHADOW_GOOD_ENDWAR_01
Do you truly wish to continue fighting? My citizens are desperate for relief from the terrors of war. I’m sure your population feels the same.
Czy na pewno chcesz kontynuować walkę? Moi obywatele zrobią wszystko, by nie doświadczać już wojennej tragedii. Z pewnością twoi ludzie czują podobnie.
GENERIC MESSAGE: GOOD VELOCITY, END-WAR DIPLOMATIC STATE
ACTION
FORESHADOW_GOOD_ENDWAR_02
I think we have both made our points very clear. There is no point in continuing to fight. Let us bring an end to this conflict between us.
Chyba już dokładnie wiemy, czego oczekują obie strony. Nie ma sensu dłużej walczyć. Zakończmy już konflikt między nami.
GENERIC MESSAGE: GOOD VELOCITY, END-WAR DIPLOMATIC STATE
ACTION
FORESHADOW_GOOD_ENDWAR_03
You have earned our begrudging respect. External factors will soon force our hand to end our war. We hope you will have the honor to agree to a ceasefire…
No dobra, zyskaliście trochę w naszych oczach. Z przyczyn zewnętrznych będziemy musieli wkrótce zakończyć wojnę. Chyba masz na tyle przyzwoitości, by zgodzić się na zawieszenie broni...
GENERIC MESSAGE: GOOD VELOCITY, END-WAR DIPLOMATIC STATE
ACTION
FORESHADOW_NEUTRAL_ENDWAR_01
We need to end this conflict between us. It is in both of our best interests to do so.
Trzeba już zakończyć ten konflikt. Opłaci się to obu stronom.
GENERIC MESSAGE: NEUTRAL VELOCITY, END-WAR DIPLOMATIC STATE
ACTION
FORESHADOW_NEUTRAL_ENDWAR_02
We are at a stalemate. Neither of us will prevail here. End this war while we both have legs to stand on.
Mamy sytuację patową. Nikt już tu nic nie ugra. Zakończmy tę wojnę, póki jeszcze trzymamy się na nogach.
GENERIC MESSAGE: NEUTRAL VELOCITY, END-WAR DIPLOMATIC STATE
ACTION
FORESHADOW_NEUTRAL_ENDWAR_03
We cannot keep fighting forever. Neither of us is getting the upper hand, and I don’t see that happening any time soon. It may be time to cease hostilities…
Nie możemy bez końca walczyć. Nikt nie jest w stanie uzyskać przewagi i to się raczej prędko nie zmieni. Może czas już zaprzestać wrogich działań...
GENERIC MESSAGE: NEUTRAL VELOCITY, END-WAR DIPLOMATIC STATE
ACTION
FORESHADOW_BAD_ENDWAR_01
I would enjoy crushing you into dust, but my resources are better spent on pursuing other goals. Perhaps we can end this conflict soon…
Z przyjemnością wbilibyśmy was w ziemię, ale wolę wykorzystywać zasoby w innych celach. Może damy sobie spokój?
GENERIC MESSAGE: BAD VELOCITY, END-WAR DIPLOMATIC STATE
ACTION
FORESHADOW_BAD_ENDWAR_02
Unfortunately, I have little time to waste on ignoble worms like you. Put an end to this war soon, and we will simply consider your continued existence a gift.
Nie chcę dłużej poświęcać czasu na niegodne robactwo waszego pokroju. Zakończ tę wojnę, a my wam sprezentujemy możliwość dalszej egzystencji.
GENERIC MESSAGE: BAD VELOCITY, END-WAR DIPLOMATIC STATE
ACTION
FORESHADOW_BAD_ENDWAR_03
Surely even a dim-witted oaf like you knows when to stop fighting. If you lay down your arms, we will refrain from wiping your puny faction off the map.
Z pewnością nawet tak durnowate fajtłapy jak wy wiedzą, kiedy walka nie ma sensu. Złóżcie broń, a powstrzymamy się przed wymazaniem z map waszego nędznego żerowiska.
GENERIC MESSAGE: BAD VELOCITY, END-WAR DIPLOMATIC STATE
ACTION
FORESHADOW_BAD_ENDWAR_04
You infuriating whelp! I should have exterminated you long ago. Your resistance has worn down my assault in the most frustrating way, and I fear that I will have to abandon this war soon.
Co za irytujące stworzenia! Trzeba było was eksterminować dawno temu. Wasz opór nadwerężył moje siły i naprawdę już mnie to denerwuje. Chyba wkrótce dam sobie spokój z tą wojną.
GENERIC MESSAGE: BAD VELOCITY, END-WAR DIPLOMATIC STATE
EVENT_DEFEATEDPLAYER

{STR_leaderName} przegrywa

Doskonała robota! {STR_leaderName} i wrogie imperium leżą u naszych stóp. To dla obu naszych imperiów kolejny krok do ostatecznego zwycięstwa na tej planecie.

NEUTRAL

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.

NEGATIVE
Hah, you may be the rising star now, but it won't last. Sooner or later, my empire will rise above all!
Może i udało ci się zostać gwiazdą, ale wszystko ma swój kres. Wcześniej czy później moje imperium rozbłyśnie największą chwałą.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
EVENT_LOWESTCAPABILITY
NEGATIVE
We've been keeping track of your capability rankings; you are the most pathetic specimen on this world and that is how it should be.

Co za nikczemność, atakować osłabionych rozbitków. Pozostali chętnie się z tobą policzą za ten akt przemocy.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.

Polepszanie relacji z tutejszymi może przynosić chwilowe zyski. Na dłuższą metę jednak... czy można im ufać?

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
EVENT_IMPROVEDRELATIONWITHFACTION
NEGATIVE
You think befriending the locals will help secure your path to victory? It will be my empire that rises above all.
Myślisz, że podlizywanie się tubylcom zapewni ci zwycięstwo? W takim razie to moje imperium zdominuje ten świat.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.

You are on the path to victory - keep it up!

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.

Dzięki tym zadaniom pozycja twojego imperium może się poprawić. Nie zaniedbuj jednak tego, co naprawdę ważne.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.

Remained idle
Bezczynność

POSITIVE
I've not heard anything from your accomplishments in a while. Hopefully you are doing well in your efforts to grow your empire so we may rise from the ruins together.
Nie słyszeliśmy ostatnio o żadnych twoich dokonaniach. Mam nadzieję, że masz się dobrze, a twoje imperium wzrasta i wkrótce razem powstaniemy z ruin.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.

NEUTRAL

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
EVENT_IDLE
NEGATIVE
We have heard nothing of importance about you for some time. I have a feeling that you're staying quiet to further your nefarious plans.
Od pewnego czasu nie słyszeliśmy o tobie niczego ważnego. Coś mi się zdaje, że milczysz tylko po to, by wcielić w życie soje niecne zamiary.

Thank you {STR_leaderName}, I will consider your offer.
Dziękuję ci, {STR_leaderName}, rozważę twoją propozycję.
